mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_favorite (announce_id, member_id, created_at) VALUES (#{announceId}, #{memberId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.announce_id AS announceId, a.announce_title AS announceTitle, a.reqst_end_date AS deadline, -- 🔑 공고 단위로 총 문서 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document d WHERE d.announce_id = a.announce_id) AS totalDocs, -- 🔑 공고 단위로 체크된 문서 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_document_check mdc JOIN document d2 ON mdc.document_id = d2.document_id WHERE d2.announce_id = a.announce_id AND mdc.member_id = f.member_id AND mdc.status = 1) AS checkedDocs FROM member_favorite f JOIN announce a ON f.announce_id = a.announce_id WHERE f.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
SELECT a.* FROM member_favorite mf JOIN announce a ON mf.announce_id = a.announce_id WHERE mf.member_id = #{memberId}
